title: Kyoto's Cherry Blossoms Are Blooming Earlier Than Any Time in Recorded History

source.name: Aono & Kazui (2008), Aono & Saito (2010), Osaka Prefecture University; JMA; JMC. Original records from imperial court documents and diaries dating to 812 CE. 2026 value is JMC 9th forecast (Mar 19, 2026).
